title: Build and statically qualify the single-correction H2.1 candidate
mission_contribution: Produces a reproducible candidate whose only semantic delta is the authorized MPG-SELA companion gate correction.

title: Run causal probes and complete Q1-Q7 only after causal pass
mission_contribution: Determines whether the correction removes false SELA loads while preserving the genuine companion and all H2 qualification behavior.

title: Run Stable comparison and paired Judge only for a qualified candidate
mission_contribution: Tests decision-changing quality, passive recall, owner fidelity, practical usability, and host-reported cost against Stable 1.4.6.

title: Close H2.1 with responsibility-separated evidence and a pushed terminal report
mission_contribution: Produces one authorized terminal outcome without release action.
